# iMBRACE SDK - Full Reference for LLMs

> iMBRACE is an enterprise-grade multi-channel engagement platform. This SDK provides a unified interface to three core gateways: **App Gateway** (Stable/v2), **Server Gateway** (3rd party automation), and **Journey API** (Marketplace).

## Documentation & Links

### Getting Started
- [Overview](https://imbraceltd.github.io/api-sdk/sdk/overview/) - Key features and architecture.
- [Installation](https://imbraceltd.github.io/api-sdk/sdk/installation/) - Step-by-step package setup for TS and Python.
- [Quick Start](https://imbraceltd.github.io/api-sdk/sdk/quick-start/) - Make your first API call in 60 seconds.

### Guides & Workflows
- [Authentication Guide](https://imbraceltd.github.io/api-sdk/sdk/authentication/) - API Key vs Access Token strategies.
- [Full Flow Guide (E2E)](https://imbraceltd.github.io/api-sdk/sdk/full-flow-guide/) - End-to-end examples for Assistants, Workflows, Knowledge Hub, and CRM.
- [Framework Integrations](https://imbraceltd.github.io/api-sdk/sdk/integrations/) - Patterns for React, Next.js, FastAPI, Django, and Celery.
- [Testing Guide](https://imbraceltd.github.io/api-sdk/guides/testing/) - Unit testing, mocking, and integration patterns.
- [Troubleshooting](https://imbraceltd.github.io/api-sdk/guides/troubleshooting/) - Common errors, 401s, and double-path issues.
- [Vibe Coding](https://imbraceltd.github.io/api-sdk/guides/vibe-coding/) - Use llms.txt with Claude, Cursor, Copilot to code faster.

### API Reference
- [Namespace Resource Reference](https://imbraceltd.github.io/api-sdk/sdk/resources/) - Detailed signatures for all 30+ namespaces.
- [AI Agent Deep Dive](https://imbraceltd.github.io/api-sdk/sdk/ai-agent/) - SSE Streaming, TraceQL, Parquet, and Chat Client Sub-API.

## Core Technical Specs
- **Naming:** TS uses `camelCase` (e.g. `streamChat`), Py uses `snake_case` (e.g. `stream_chat`).
- **Org Context:** Always send `x-organization-id`. Controlled via `organizationId` or `IMBRACE_ORGANIZATION_ID`.
- **Backend Routing:** Gateway routes most logic through `/v1/backend` or `/v2/backend`. SDK handles this automatically.
- **Retries:** Exponential backoff for 429/5xx. TS: 2 retries. Py: 3 retries.

## Implementation "Must-Knows"

### Critical Schemas
- **Board Item Create:** `fields: [{ board_field_id: string, value: any }]`. Note: Identifier field is usually required.
- **Board Item Update:** `data: [{ key: fieldId, value: any }]`.
- **AI Agent SSE:** Events start with `data: `. Payload: `{"type": "text-delta", "textDelta": "..."}` or `[DONE]`.

### Implementation Pitfalls
- **Workflow State:** Newly created flows are `DRAFT`. You MUST add a trigger and call `LOCK_AND_PUBLISH` before they can be triggered.
- **Conversation Params:** `conversations.list()` requires `type` (e.g., 'channel') and `view` (e.g., 'all') to avoid 400 errors.
- **Base URL:** `IMBRACE_BASE_URL` must be a root domain. Do not add path fragments.

## Resource Inventory (Selected)

### AI & Agents
- **`chatAi`**: Assistant CRUD, LLM completions, Knowledge Hub, File Extraction.
- **`aiAgent`**: Streaming Chat (SSE), Sub-agent, Embeddings/RAG, Parquet, Tracing.

### CRM & Automation
- **`boards`**: CRM pipelines. CRUD for `items`, `fields`, and `segments`.
- **`activepieces`**: Visual workflow builder. Mandatory ops: `UPDATE_TRIGGER`, `LOCK_AND_PUBLISH`.

### Messaging & Engagement
- **`contacts`**: Customer profiles, activities, and notifications.
- **`conversations`**: Management, assignment, status, and `listParticipants(id)`.
- **`messages`**: Sending text/media, comments, pins.
- **`channel`**: Config for WhatsApp, FB, WeChat, LINE, Email, and Web.

### Platform & IPS
- **`platform`**: Orgs, Teams, Permissions, and `listBusinessUnits()`.
- **`ips`**: Profile management and `listIdentities(userId)`.

## Service Key Registry (URL Overrides)
`gateway`, `platform`, `channel_service`, `data_board`, `backend`, `ips`, `ai`, `marketplaces`, `file_service`, `message_suggestion`, `predict`, `activepieces`, `ai_agent`.

## Error Hierarchy
- `ImbraceError` (Base)
    - `AuthError` (401/403): Invalid credentials. **No retry.**
    - `ApiError` (4xx/5xx): Has `statusCode`.
    - `NetworkError`: Connection/Timeout. **Auto retry.**
